problem id: c711f9dd
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  00101110 -> 01011100
  10010011 -> 00100111
  10101000 -> 01010001
  00100110 -> 01001100
  11011111 -> 00111111
  01110110 -> 01101100
  10110100 -> 01101001
  01110011 -> 00100110
  00111000 -> 01110000

query: 01100000
predicted answer: 11000000
